title: oxalis artemioides
intro: Oxalis artemioides, also known as the wood sorrel, is a perennial herb in the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae) native to South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. Oxalis artemioides offers various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving gastrointestinal issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
